systemInformation.boundaryNarrative: LSS-001 comprises the web application tier, PostgreSQL database, and scheduled batch jobs hosted in the fictional Meridian Research Lab private cloud. External integrations are limited to campus LDAP for authentication and a read-only calendar API.

controlImplementations.requirementText: Define and manage system accounts, including establishing conditions for group and role membership.
controlImplementations.implementationNarrative: LSS-001 provisions accounts through ServiceNow requests approved by the system owner. Role-based access is enforced via LDAP group mappings. Quarterly access reviews are documented in the GRC tool.

evidenceAttachments.extractedTextBlob: Policy LSS-AC-001 requires documented approval for all LSS-001 account creation and role changes. Standard users receive the LSS-User role; administrators receive LSS-Admin only after manager and ISSO dual approval. Accounts for contractors expire automatically after 90 days unless renewed.

evidenceAttachments.docTitle: Q1 FY2025 LSS-001 Access Certification Export
evidenceAttachments.extractedTextBlob: Access certification completed for 47 LSS-001 accounts. Reviewers: system owner Jane Doe (fictional), ISSO proxy. Results: 2 role downgrades applied, 1 contractor account disabled. Certification signed in GRC workflow ID CERT-2025-0142.

nistControl.label: AU-6
nistControl.title: Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting

controlImplementations.requirementText: Review and analyze system audit records for indications of inappropriate or unusual activity.
controlImplementations.implementationNarrative: Security operations reviews application and authentication logs weekly using a documented SOP. Findings are tracked in the lab ticketing system.

evidenceAttachments.docTitle: Log Review SOP for Lab Applications
evidenceAttachments.extractedTextBlob: SOP SEC-LOG-004 defines weekly review of authentication failures, privilege escalation events, and application error spikes for Moderate systems including LSS-001.

Weekly log review ticket LOG-2026-0522 completed by analyst Alex Chen (fictional). Reviewed 12,847 auth events; flagged 3 repeated failed logins from single IP (resolved as misconfigured lab terminal). Reviewer attestation: Log review complete; no unauthorized activity identified.

controlImplementations.requirementText: Establish and document configuration settings for information technology products employed within the system.
controlImplementations.implementationNarrative: LSS-001 servers are hardened per DISA STIG guidance. Ansible playbooks enforce baseline settings on deploy. Claims full STIG alignment for RHEL 9 and PostgreSQL 15.

evidenceAttachments.docTitle: Configuration Management Policy for Lab Systems
evidenceAttachments.extractedTextBlob: Policy CM-LAB-002 requires documented baselines for all production systems. Changes require CAB approval. LSS-001 must maintain hardened images aligned with DISA STIGs.

Generic checklist covering SSH hardening, password policy, and firewall defaults for RHEL-based systems. Does not include LSS-001-specific scan results or hostnames. Several checklist items marked N/A - verify during assessment.

controlImplementations.requirementText: Implement an incident handling capability for incidents that includes preparation, detection and analysis, containment, eradication, and recovery.
controlImplementations.implementationNarrative: The lab IR plan covers LSS-001 as a Moderate-impact system. Tabletop exercises are conducted annually.

evidenceAttachments.docTitle: Meridian Lab Incident Response Plan Excerpt - LSS-001
evidenceAttachments.extractedTextBlob: IR plan section 4.2 covers LSS-001 incident categories: unauthorized access, data integrity loss, and availability events. Recovery RTO target: 4 hours for Moderate impact.

Tabletop scenario: compromised service account used to export scheduling data. Exercise validated contact tree reachability within 15 minutes. Gap identified: backup restore runbook missing PostgreSQL point-in-time steps.

controlImplementations.requirementText: Monitor and scan for vulnerabilities in the system and hosted applications.
controlImplementations.implementationNarrative: Weekly authenticated scans run against LSS-001 production hosts. Critical findings are remediated within 30 days.

evidenceAttachments.extractedTextBlob: Authenticated scan of 3 LSS-001 hosts (app-01, app-02, db-01). Total findings: 2 Medium, 5 Low. Scan report lists IP addresses but does not include a current asset inventory mapping hostnames to authorization boundary components.

orphanedArtifacts.extractedTextBlob: Draft procedure describing nightly file-level backups for LSS-001 application data to lab NAS share BACKUP-LSS-01. Document marked DRAFT and not yet mapped to any control in the GRC tool.

_internal.note: This export uses Archer/CSAM field names and nesting; not the internal canonical schema.
